method: G4 slaving reconstruction with two complementary tests: (Q1) functional-form sufficiency via 4-parameter sigmoid of the bare degree and a richer 6-feature linear regression (degree, Laplacian-squared diagonal, three Fiedler coordinates, mean edge weight) on per-node ff_K, ff_Q means; (Q2) Lipschitz-stability via max ||A_s1 - A_s2|| / ||Xi_s1 - Xi_s2||_F across all available seed pairs. The Q2 test directly probes the structural slaving statement: small Xi-perturbations induce bounded (A, Q)-perturbations via a continuous map F.

Q2_lipschitz_stability.interpretation: Finite max Lipschitz ratio ==> slaving map F is Lipschitz-continuous on the tested seed-pair set; small Xi-perturbations induce bounded (A, Q)-perturbations -- the structurally meaningful slaving stability statement.

Finite max Lipschitz ratio ==> slaving map F is Lipschitz-continuous on the tested seed-pair set; small Xi-perturbations induce bounded (A, Q)-perturbations -- the structurally meaningful slaving stability statement.

Finite max Lipschitz ratio ==> slaving map F is Lipschitz-continuous on the tested seed-pair set; small Xi-perturbations induce bounded (A, Q)-perturbations -- the structurally meaningful slaving stability statement.

Q2_lipschitz_stability_status: SLAVING_FIXPOINT_REGIME_CONSTANT: max Lipschitz ratios (0.000e+00_A / 0.000e+00_Q) are zero to machine precision across all seed-pair combinations. This is the SHARP slaving statement at the seed-level: ff_K, ff_Q are regime-constants, INVARIANT under seed-dependent Xi-fluctuations -- the asymptotic factor fields are slaved to the regime-fixpoint, NOT to the per-snapshot Xi. Trivially Lipschitz-continuous with L = 0; the structurally meaningful slaving test would now use across-regime perturbations (different N) with appropriate spatial rescaling, which requires a separate methodology not bundled here.
verdict: Q1: FUNCTIONAL_FORM_INSUFFICIENT_AT_TESTED_FEATURES (sigmoid-of-degree R^2_A = 0.095; richer 6-feature linear R^2_A = 0.062; sigmoid-of-lap2 R^2_Q = 0.085; richer 6-feature linear R^2_Q = 0.096). Q2: SLAVING_FIXPOINT_REGIME_CONSTANT: max Lipschitz ratios (0.000e+00_A / 0.000e+00_Q) are zero to machine precision across all seed-pair combinations. This is the SHARP slaving statement at the seed-level: ff_K, ff_Q are regime-constants, INVARIANT under seed-dependent Xi-fluctuations -- the asymptotic factor fields are slaved to the regime-fixpoint, NOT to the per-snapshot Xi. Trivially Lipschitz-continuous with L = 0; the structurally meaningful slaving test would now use across-regime perturbations (different N) with appropriate spatial rescaling, which requires a separate methodology not bundled here.
